image_prompt: A funny and slightly dramatic scene. A sleek, modern sports car is stranded on a deserted, winding road under a bright blue sky. The driver, looking exasperated, is standing beside the car, pointing frantically at the empty fuel gauge on the dashboard, which is clearly visible and displays "FUEL EMPTY". A small, cartoonish thought bubble above the car's hood shows a tiny gas pump icon with a sad face. The text "O carro anda com combustível." is prominently displayed on a roadside billboard in the background, adding to the irony. Cinematic, high-contrast, slightly comedic tone.
caption: A revelação do século! 🤯 Parece óbvio, mas quem nunca esqueceu de abastecer e se viu em apuros? Marque aquele amigo que vive no limite da reserva! 😂 #Combustivel #VidaDeMotorista #CoisasQueAcontecem #HumorNoTransito #SempreAbasteça
